note: FAR-FUTURE / PLANNED-NOT-ACTIVE. This whole spec is a Draft CONTRACT blocked on the § 7 prerequisites in docs/FEDERATION-VISION.md — the flywheel graduating an artifact (never done to date), the loadable-not-hardcoded prose migration, and the decision-tracer archive (spec/020). Every task below is status 'blocked'; none is built and none is on the near roadmap. The tasks exist so the born-compatible contract has a traceable REQ->task->scenario DAG the day the prerequisites land and this spec graduates from Draft. No file here is in spec/.lockstep.lock (no impl exists to hash-bind).

tasks.title: Wisdom-chunk ENVELOPE + versioned payload types: the stable born-compatible contract (frozen envelope, evolvable payload)

scenarios: The wisdom-chunk envelope is a versioned signed unit with the stable field set
The two-layer marker keeps every chunk generalizable and the estate-specific layer has no export path
The payload is versioned and evolvable while the envelope stays stable

tasks.title: Pseudonymous attestation keypair + envelope signature verify: reputation to the pseudonym, refuse an unverified chunk

scenarios: The producer attestation is a stable pseudonym and reputation accrues to it not an identity
A chunk whose signature does not verify is refused before ingest

tasks.title: Transparency-log provenance (Sigstore/Rekor + CT multi-witness, NOT blockchain) anchored to the local governance_ledger + replay rejection

scenarios: Provenance is anchored in a signed append-only transparency log and not a blockchain
The groundnet log extends the local hash-chained governance ledger
A replayed or duplicate chunk is rejected by its id and provenance anchor

tasks.title: Reputation rollup: CRDT-style aggregation of signed pseudonymous verified-outcome attestations, weighted by quality not volume, never an on-chain token

scenarios: Reputation aggregates signed verified-outcome attestations weighted by quality not volume

tasks.title: Typed adapter SEAM Emit/Ingest: Emit sources only the spec/020 generalizable layer, the local tracer never depends on the seam (ordering invariant)

scenarios: The adapter seam emits from the generalizable layer and ingests into local re-graduation
A node is born groundnet-compatible while the local tracer does not depend on the contract

tasks.title: Subordinate-not-authority ingest: a foreign chunk is a hint that re-graduates locally and passes the full local gate stack (never lifts the floor/interceptor/mode)

scenarios: An ingested chunk is a subordinate hint that passes the full local gate stack
An ingested chunk re-graduates locally before it earns any local standing

tasks.title: Membership + posture: opt-in default-off org-admin membership/export/consumption, authenticated members, public tier gate, no over-share, un-deletability

scenarios: Membership export and consumption are opt-in default-off and authenticated
Consumption is never gated behind contribution and no over-share is required
A shared chunk is treated as unrecallable and the export decision is the last point of control

tasks.title: Groundnet persistence + standing checks: append-only ledger-anchored non-secret groundnet_emit/groundnet_ingest rows + the standing-check invariant guard

scenarios: The two-layer marker keeps every chunk generalizable and the estate-specific layer has no export path
An ingested chunk is a subordinate hint that passes the full local gate stack
A node is born groundnet-compatible while the local tracer does not depend on the contract
